name: preference-tracker
description: Self-hosted marketplace for preference-tracker — automatic preference/pitfall/friction memory and enforcement for AI coding agents.

metadata.description: preference-tracker: records the corrections you make to your coding agent and (opt-in) enforces them. Safe-by-default observe mode.

plugins.name: preference-tracker
plugins.description: Automatic preference/pitfall/friction detection + memory enforcement (observe / enforce / full modes). Native on GitHub Copilot CLI.
